title: Oh My Sherd
description: Adds a variety of new pottery sherds to the game. These sherds seamlessly integrate with both vanilla sherds and sherds from other mods.
body:
This mod adds a variety of new pottery sherds to the game. These sherds seamlessly integrate with both vanilla sherds and even sherds from other mods!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NazssWmx/images/3a3c1f53ac4a039c07ad9843e687283418eb988b.png)

## Remains Sherds
The remains sherd features a cartoonish skull. These sherds can be found in suspicious gravel that generates in the floor of skeleton monster spawners. In addition to the remains sherd you can uncover the vanilla skull sherd, bones, skeleton skulls, and even wither skills if you are very lucky. One suspicious gravel will always generate below the spawner and up to 5 additional gravel can spawn embedded in the nearby floor.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NazssWmx/images/d7288d153bc3e4d63b58ba6d0833388f4460de90.png)

## Future Content
This mod is being actively developed! While the snip and invader sherds are implemented they can only be obtained using the give command for now. A way to obtain these patterns will be added in a future update along with even more patterns for you to uncover. Future updates will also include support for mods like [Sherd Duplication](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sherd-duplication) and [Archaeology Banners](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/archaeology-banners)! I will also be adding new sherds as I come up with designs that I like.
